_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.
updated: 2026-06-25 (C1 true-scale substrate diagnostic — city→country non-viable; C1 ceiling'd, D-C1TS-1)
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the 'LLM-as-Database' spec is implementable BEFORE it is built; deliver a ready / not-ready-with-conditions determination. Falsification-first.
current_latest: **C1 TRUE-SCALE SUBSTRATE DIAGNOSTIC (2026-06-25, D-C1TS-1; folded into F1_DETERMINATION C1).** Operator-greenlit the true-scale C1 fork (B3N cond-3, sharpest write-side falsifier). Screen found 2,631 native-known `city→country` single-token facts (looked unblocked) — but native-knowledge is necessary-not-sufficient. Pilot + cheap diagnostics (advisor-steered) found the substrate **NON-VIABLE on two editability walls**: (1) **multi-token city subjects** (2,516/2,631) → ill-conditioned AlphaEdit solve → **ΔW blow-up, model emits garbage** (the N=2,000 pilot collapse is **weight-destruction, NOT compaction corruption**; single-token-subject N=50/100 stay clean: held-out 100%/86.7%); (2) **strong-prior counterfactual under-expression** — even clean subjects express only 27–42% (R5/R13 fragility) < the ≥85% gate. → **true-2,000-scale C1 with real native knowledge is NOT runnable with this recipe/substrate; the 78-entity country pool (C1-(a), N≤100) stays the clean ceiling → C1 is now characterized AND substrate-CEILING'd.** Cost anchor: N=2,000 single-solve = 62 min. **Pilot-first prevented a 4–10-day wasted grid.** **FRONTIER INFLECTION:** falsification largely done; remaining gaps (C2 index/query layer, C5 governance) are BUILD/REGIME not one-more-run; reinforces D-B3N-1 (unstable counterfactual-at-scale = the side-store-routed incremental path, not the proven batch core). **F1 net readiness UNCHANGED (NOT-READY-WITH-CONDITIONS).** `docs/C1_TRUESCALE_SUBSTRATE_DIAGNOSTIC.md`.
next_actions: FRONTIER INFLECTION (2026-06-25): falsification of the 3B/AlphaEdit/single-token-real-knowledge regime has reached its evidence frontier (C1 substrate-ceiling'd). Remaining movement = BUILD or REGIME-change, operator-reserved. In rough priority:

(1) BUILD the index/query layer (C2 — load-bearing; R1-bit commit-time delivered, R1/R4/R7/R8/R16 + the 5 query families largely unbuilt) OR C5 Phase-2 empirical governance + the D-C5-1 read-surface recs (tier/freshness-marked bit). These are engineering, not falsification.
(2) REGIME change to push C1/C3 past the ceiling: larger model / better edit method / a deployment that avoids counterfactual-over-prior at scale (ties to deployment-target-TBD). Operator scope call.

(3) CPU-CHEAP QUERY CELL — R4 namespace / R7 aggregation-negation / R8 multi-hop / R16 provenance. Mostly index/governance-delegated; lower F1 value (R8 tautology-trap, R7 spec-under-specified) but additive.
(4) GOVERNANCE/SECURITY/PRUNING C5/C6/C7 — prototyped not empirical, security un-red-teamed, Pruning/GC untouched (Phase-2 red-team).

STANDING: re-auth codex/gpt-5.5 (refresh_token_reused; Perplexity-Sonar = working cross-family fallback). Guardrails: spec-first · pre-register + advisor before build AND before verdict · name-the-manipulated-variable · cross-family on interpretation-subtle results (waive on decisive).
f1_verdict: DETERMINATION DRAFTED 2026-06-24 (`docs/F1_DETERMINATION.md`) = **NOT-READY-WITH-CONDITIONS** (draft-with-open-conditions, NOT a clean close; shippable as the honest current state). Deployment data-path spine PROVEN-FOR-SCOPE (recipe→A1 batch-clean→B3 Q4_K_M→E1·A CPU-serve; 3B/N≤100/band[4-8]/single-batch/1-seed/fictional). Architecture = scope-keyed COMPACTION-BOUNDED HYBRID (D-B3N-1), in-weight a serving copy per the verified §11.2/D42 structural finding (no class weights-authoritative). Determination carries a 10-row CONDITIONS REGISTER of first-class falsifiers: C1 compaction-at-scale (sharpest; D20 directionally negative) · C2 read-contract (biggest gap) · C3 R5-at-scale · C4 7B numeric transfer (OQ-W1) · C5 governance+orchestration (prototyped-not-empirical) · C6 security (un-red-teamed) · C7 Pruning/GC (untouched) · C8 R15-adversarial · C9 R9-native-deletion · C10 multi-token/G7. C1/C2 closing negative would move the verdict toward not-implementable-as-specified. Closure-path lead = UNGATED `tools/power.py` pool-sizing.
